## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `cargo clippy` (from `src-tauri/`)
- [ ] Strings localized (`english.ts` / `bootstrap.ts` as appropriate)
- [ ] Capabilities updated if new IPC (`src-tauri/capabilities/default.json`)
- [ ] Manual smoke test on Windows 10/11
